data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the check-in tracking feature, specifically to confirm who arrived and when. However, the provided evidence does not include any details or data points that indicate the system tracks check-ins or provides timestamps for arrivals. The linked use case mentions the need for check-in tracking, but the absence of relevant evidence indicates a gap in fulfilling this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of check-in tracking (who arrived, when).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add check-in tracking evidence
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system logs check-in events with user details and timestamps.
